title: What kind of knife is the Progressive Knife based off of
display_title: What kind of knife is the Progressive Knife based off of
wikitext:
[]: What kind of knife is the Progressive Knife based off of?             Quote Post by Sentient Evangelion » Sat Mar 19, 2022 6:36 am I was recently watching some clips from the show, most of which involved the EVA's using their weapons. One clip peaked my interest though, the scene in which Shinji equips the Prog Knife and stabs Shamshel to death--or more accurately, screams his head off while digging the knife into Shamshel's core. So, this made me wonder about the type of knife that the Prog Knife is based off of. A lot of the weapons for the EVA units are mech-sized versions of real world weaponry, so the knife would have to be mech-sized version of a type of knife. So then, I'm curious on what you possibly think the basis of the Progressive Knife originates from.

[]: Re: What kind of knife is the Progressive Knife based off of?             Quote Post by Blockio » Sat Mar 19, 2022 11:05 am It's a fairly generic knife; I have one not too dissimilar

[]: Re: What kind of knife is the Progressive Knife based off of?             Quote Post by silvermoonlight » Sat Mar 19, 2022 1:49 pm To me, it always looked like a craft knife, the old type which had a blade edge you could snap off when blunted. This is more NGE/EOE version, at least, i'm not sure about the rebuild version. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: What kind of knife is the Progressive Knife based off of?             Quote Post by Sentient Evangelion » Sat Mar 19, 2022 3:00 pm Now that I think about it, it seems like a combination between that knife, and one of those cheap ones that you have to pull the blade out of manually.

[]: Re: What kind of knife is the Progressive Knife based off of?             Quote Post by Blockio » Sat Mar 19, 2022 10:27 pm Oh yeah, the 02 one is definitely based on a carpet knife. I was talking about 01's

[]: Re: What kind of knife is the Progressive Knife based off of?             Quote Post by nerv bae » Wed Mar 23, 2022 6:59 pm Per the wiki , prog knifes vibrate !

[]: Re: What kind of knife is the Progressive Knife based off of?             Quote Post by Sentient Evangelion » Wed Mar 23, 2022 8:46 pm Well I've finally come to conclusion on Unit-01's Prog Knife, it's probably a really shorter version of a simple bowie knife, but with some slight changes to it.

[]: Re: What kind of knife is the Progressive Knife based off of?             Quote Post by OutlawThirds » Sat Apr 02, 2022 11:14 pm nerv bae wrote: Per the wiki , prog knifes vibrate !

[]: Re: What kind of knife is the Progressive Knife based off of?             Quote Post by BobbyDV303 » Sat Nov 25, 2023 11:40 am I was always under the impression they were inspired by the knives from Dune or something.

One clip peaked my interest though, the scene in which Shinji equips the Prog Knife and stabs Shamshel to death--or more accurately, screams his head off while digging the knife into Shamshel's core. So, this made me wonder about the type of knife that the Prog Knife is based off of. A lot of the weapons for the EVA units are mech-sized versions of real world weaponry, so the knife would have to be mech-sized version of a type of knife. So then, I'm curious on what you possibly think the basis of the Progressive Knife originates from.
